---
title: "STAT 306 Project Code"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(gridExtra)
library(car)
library(leaps)
```

# Introduction

## Read Data

```{r}
insurance <- read.csv("insurance.csv")
summary(insurance)
```

# Analysis

## EDA

```{r}
# Plot: Distribution of charges (histogram)
p1 <- ggplot(insurance, aes(x = charges)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Insurance Charges",
       x = "Charges (USD)", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()

p1
ggsave("plot1_charges_distribution.png", plot = p1, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
p2 <- ggplot(insurance, aes(x = age, y = log(charges), color = smoker)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("no" = "#4472C4", "yes" = "#E05C5C"),
                     name = "Smoker") +
  labs(
    title = "Log Tansformed Charges vs. Age by Smoking Status",
    x = "Age (years)",
    y = "Log Charges (log USD)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
p2
```

```{r}
non_smoker <- subset(insurance, smoker == "no")
smoker <- subset(insurance, smoker == "yes")
smoker
```

```{r}
# Plot: Age vs LogCharges in Smokers
smoker <- smoker %>%
  filter(smoker == "yes") %>%
  mutate(log_charges = log(charges))

p3 <- ggplot(smoker, aes(x = age, y = log_charges, color = bmi)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "blue", high = "red") +
  labs(title = "Age vs LogCharges colored by BMI in Smokers")

```

```{r}
# Plot: Age vs charges in NonSmoker
p4<- ggplot(non_smoker, aes(x = age, y = charges, colour=bmi)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.5) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "blue", high = "red") +
  labs(title = "Charges vs Age in Non-mokers",
       x = "Age",
       y = "Charges")
p4
```

## Model Fitting

```{r}
regfit_ns <- regsubsets(
  charges ~ age + sex + bmi + children + region,
  data = non_smoker,
  nvmax = 10
)

regfit_s <- regsubsets(
  log_charges ~ age + sex + bmi + children + region,
  data = smoker,
  nvmax = 10
)
```

```{r}
summary_ns <- summary(regfit_ns)
summary_s  <- summary(regfit_s)
```

```{r}
plot(summary_ns$cp,
     xlab = "Number of predictors",
     ylab = "Cp",
     main = "Mallows Cp (Non-smokers)",
     type = "b")

abline(0, 1, col = "red")   # Cp ≈ p line
```

```{r}
plot(summary_s$cp,
     xlab = "Number of predictors",
     ylab = "Cp",
     main = "Mallows Cp (Smokers)",
     type = "b")

abline(0, 1, col = "red")
```

```{r}
which.min(summary_ns$cp)
which.min(summary_s$cp)
```

```{r}
summary_ns$which[which.min(summary_ns$cp), ]
summary_s$which[(which.min(summary_s$cp)), ]
```

```{r}
model_with_region <- lm(log_charges ~ age + sex + bmi + region,
                        data = smoker)

# Model WITHOUT region
model_without_region <- lm(log_charges ~ age + sex + bmi ,
                           data = smoker)

# Create comparison table
comparison_smoker <- data.frame(
  Model = c("With Region", "Without Region"),
  Adj_R2 = c(summary(model_with_region)$adj.r.squared,
             summary(model_without_region)$adj.r.squared),
  AIC = c(AIC(model_with_region),
          AIC(model_without_region)),
  BIC = c(BIC(model_with_region),
          BIC(model_without_region))
)

comparison_smoker
```

```{r}
model_ns_with_region <- lm(charges ~ age + children + region,
                           data = non_smoker)

# Model WITHOUT region
model_ns_without_region <- lm(charges ~ age + children,
                              data = non_smoker)

# Comparison table
comparison_ns <- data.frame(
  Model = c("With Region", "Without Region"),
  Adj_R2 = c(summary(model_ns_with_region)$adj.r.squared,
             summary(model_ns_without_region)$adj.r.squared),
  AIC = c(AIC(model_ns_with_region),
          AIC(model_ns_without_region)),
  BIC = c(BIC(model_ns_with_region),
          BIC(model_ns_without_region))
)

comparison_ns
```

```{r}
summary(model_ns_with_region)
```
